claim_pattern: (?i)\b(retro(spective)?\s+(done|complete|run)|harvested the lesson|banked the lesson|logged (it|the lesson)|recorded the lesson|wrote (it )?to the wiki)\b
message: claimed the retrospective lesson was harvested/logged without a wiki.py/write_gate/log.md write (or a fetch read-back) in the last 5 tool uses — run the gated write and quote it, or fetch the page to prove it persisted
